caption: A person in green military fatigues and a camouflage helmet moves through a debris-strewn outdoor area near a damaged building. As the scene progresses, the focus shifts to a soldier wearing a green camouflage uniform, a tactical vest, and a white armband. This soldier, who has a dark beard, is shown in mid-motion, walking past foliage and wooden debris. Other individuals in similar green military clothing are visible in the background, with one person carrying a rifle. The environment consists of dirt, scattered rubble, and green shrubs. The text "Hero Ukraine" appears as a watermark on the left side of the images, and a red circular logo containing the number "13" is visible in the upper right corner of each frame. The sequence captures a transition from a wider shot of the wreckage to closer views of the soldiers moving through the terrain.
